description: A national broadcaster needs to show different live games in different cities based on regional broadcast rights.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the broadcast schedule and the regional rights for all games being played tonight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of which game should be shown in which city.

nodes.task_description: Configure the broadcast playout system to route the correct game feed to each regional affiliate station.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the routing rules for the evening's broadcasts.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the feeds at the start of the broadcast to ensure all regions are receiving the correct game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that the correct content is being broadcast in each region.
